section_title_bodytext_mission_briefing: Great to have you on board!
section_bodytext_paragraph_one_mission_b: I am your guide through the digital galaxy: from pixel planets to HTML & CSS orbits to interactive interfaces that take off. My mission? To bring designs to life and steer code into smooth stellar trajectories.
section_bodytext_paragraph_two_mission_b: I combine UI design with front-end development: conceptually well thought-out, technically clean, and with a clear focus on user guidance. My goal is to design digital products that are visually appealing as well as high-performing and structured.
copyright: 2026 Virginia Dächer - Made with curiosity, clean code & a love for good interfaces.

privacy.policy_bodytext:
1. Responsible Entity

The entity responsible for data processing on this website is:

Virginia Dächer
Otto-Wels-Straße 25
51379 Leverkusen
Germany

Email: [virginiadaecher@gmail.com]

2. Processing of Personal Data When Visiting the Website

When you visit this website, the hosting provider automatically collects information that your browser transmits. This includes, in particular:

  • IP address
  • Date and time of the request
  • Amount of data transferred
  • Website from which the request originates
  • Browser type and version
  • Operating system used

These data are technically necessary to display the website correctly and to ensure the stability and security of the web offering. Processing is based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR.

3. Hosting

This website is hosted by Uberspace. The hosting provider processes personal data of website visitors (e.g., IP addresses) to provide and securely operate the website.

Further information can be found in the hosting provider’s privacy policy.

4. Contact via Email

If you contact us by email, the personal data you provide will be used exclusively to process your request. Processing is based on Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR or Art. 6 para. 1 lit. f GDPR.

5. External Links and Profiles

This website contains links to external platforms:

  • GitHub
  • Dribbble
  • Xing
  • LinkedIn

When visiting these external websites, the privacy policies of the respective providers apply.

6. Cookies and Tracking

No own cookies are set on this website, and no tracking or analytics tools are used.

7. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict processing, data portability, and to object to the processing of your personal data according to Art. 15–21 GDPR.

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.

Information According to § 5 TMG

Virginia Dächer
Otto-Wels-Straße 25
51379 Leverkusen
Germany

Email: [virginiadaecher@gmail.com]

Responsible for Content According to § 18 para. 2 MStV

Virginia Dächer
Otto-Wels-Straße 25
51379 Leverkusen

project_preview_portfolio_alt: Portfolio website preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_portfolio_alt: Portfolio website preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_portfolio_aria: The project 'Portfolio website' opens in an overlay with more information
project_portfolio_description:
Mission: Concept, design, and technical implementation of my own portfolio platform.

This website was entirely conceptualized, designed, and implemented by me to showcase my work as a Frontend Developer and UI/UX Designer. The goal was an interactive, responsive portfolio that combines design, code, and storytelling while providing visitors with an intuitive, visually engaging experience.

I developed the entire UX and UI myself – from the information architecture concept to interactive elements and final visual design. Design was done in Figma, implementation in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. For the modern frontend setup, Node.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, and an up-to-date browserlist via Can I Use were used. The entire project is versioned and maintained via Git and developed in Visual Studio Code.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Design, Frontend Development (HTML/CSS/JS), Project setup with Node/Vite/Tailwind, Git versioning
project_preview_koelnticket_alt: Project koelnticket.de preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_koelnticket_alt: Project koelnticket.de preview in various devices
project_preview_koelnticket_aria: The project 'koelnticket.de' opens in an overlay with more information
project_koelnticket_description:
Mission: Development of digital ticketing platform features for the cultural and events sector.

Since 2017, I have been involved in conceptualizing, designing, and technically implementing new features to improve the user experience. In close collaboration with design and development teams, solutions were created to guide users intuitively through extensive event offerings.

My focus was on combining UI design and frontend implementation – from the initial concept idea, through design, to implementation in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript within the TYPO3 CMS.

The shown example includes an artist page that I independently conceptualized, designed, and implemented.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Implementation in Fluid, LESS, and JavaScript

Tools: Adobe XD, PHPStorm
project_preview_benrathshop_alt: Partnershop Schloss Benrath preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_benrathshop_alt: Partnershop Schloss Benrath preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_benrathshop_aria: The project 'Partnershop Schloss Benrath' opens in an overlay with more information
project_benrathshop_title: Schloss Benrath Partner Shop – Custom Event Platform
project_benrathshop_description:
Mission: Development of a customizable partner shop for an event partner.

For partners of DERTICKETSERVICE.DE, standalone shop systems can be created that visually and functionally adapt to the respective partner's corporate design. The goal is to present events via their own platform while leveraging the ticket platform's technical infrastructure.

For the Schloss Benrath partner shop, a custom interface was conceptualized and implemented, following the partner's visual identity and offering clear user guidance.

A central feature is a specially developed event calendar displaying only the partner's events, giving visitors a quick overview of current events.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Implementation in Fluid, SASS, and JavaScript

Tools: Adobe XD, PHPStorm
project_preview_carta_alt: Carta Ticketing System preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_carta_alt: Carta Ticketing System preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_carta_aria: The project 'Carta Ticketing System' opens in an overlay with more information
project_carta_description:
Mission: Redesign of a responsive ticketing platform for the internal 'Carta' system.

A new responsive interface was conceptualized and implemented for the 'Carta' ticketing system of DERTICKETSERVICE.DE. The goal was to develop a modern, flexible interface accommodating various event requirements and cross-brand use within the ticket platform.

Special attention was given to clear structure and responsive design, ensuring intuitive and reliable ticket purchase across devices.

The design was conceptualized by me and implemented in HTML and CSS.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Implementation in HTML and CSS
project_preview_bunttoo_alt: Bunttoo – Image & Text editor preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_bunttoo_alt: Bunttoo – Image & Text editor preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_bunttoo_aria: The project 'Bunttoo – Image & Text editor' opens in an overlay with more information
project_bunttoo_title: Bunttoo – Image & Text Editor for Events
project_bunttoo_description:
Mission: Development of a flexible online platform for creating event images and text.

A web application was developed for Bunttoo, allowing users to combine text and image content for events and prepare them for social media or print.

Special focus was on an intuitive drag-and-drop interface, preview functionality, and real-time text editing.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Implementation in HTML, CSS, JavaScript
project_preview_domaindepot_alt: DasDomainDepot – Corporate Website preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_domaindepot_alt: DasDomainDepot – Corporate Website preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_domaindepot_aria: The project 'DasDomainDepot – Corporate Website' opens in an overlay with more information
project_domaindepot_description:
Mission: Concept and implementation of a new corporate website within the existing corporate design.

In 2020, a new website was developed for the agency DasDomainDepot.de GmbH based in Radevormwald. The goal was to create a modern, structured web presence visually aligned with the existing corporate design while clearly presenting the company's services.

In addition to concept and design, my focus was on the technical implementation. A special element are CSS animations integrated on the subpages, implemented entirely without JavaScript, adding extra visual dynamics.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Implementation in HTML/Twig and SASS
project_preview_sipgate_dashboard_alt: sipgate – Telephony Webapp preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_sipgate_dashboard_alt: sipgate – Telephony Webapp preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_sipgate_dashboard_aria: The project 'sipgate – Telephony Webapp' opens in an overlay with more information
project_sipgate_dashboard_description:
Mission: Design and further development of a central interface for managing multiple telephony products.

A web application was developed for the sipgate communication platform that allows customers to manage various telephony products within a single interface. The goal was to create a clear and intuitive user interface that makes complex functions easily accessible.

The application serves a large user base and combines several products within a consistent interface concept.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Implementation with React and SASS
project_preview_sipgate_gmail_extension_: sipgate – Gmail Telephony Extension preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_sipgate_gmail_extension_: sipgate – Gmail Telephony Extension preview in a MacBook Pro
project_preview_sipgate_gmail_extension_: The project 'sipgate – Gmail Telephony Extension' opens in an overlay with more information
project_sipgate_gmail_extension_descript:
Mission: Concept and design of a browser extension to integrate telephony functions into Gmail.

A Google Chrome extension was designed for customers of sipgate team Pro, allowing telephony features to be used directly within Gmail. The goal was to make daily communication more efficient and seamlessly integrate telephony into workflows.

The interface allows users to start calls directly from the browser without leaving their email environment.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept
project_preview_erstwaehler_alt: Landtagswahl 2017 – First-time voter portal preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_erstwaehler_alt: Landtagswahl 2017 – First-time voter portal preview in MacBook, Tablet, and iPhone
project_preview_erstwaehler_aria: The project 'Landtagswahl 2017 – First-time voter portal' opens in an overlay with more information
project_preview_erstwaehler_company: School Project, Albrecht Dürer Vocational College, Düsseldorf
project_erstwaehler_title: State Election 2017 – Information Platform for First-Time Voters
project_erstwaehler_description:
Mission: Development of an informative platform to support young first-time voters.

As part of a school project, a website was created specifically for young people voting for the first time in a state election. The goal was to present political content clearly and provide an easy entry point to the topic of elections.

In addition to information on parties and programs, users could participate in a simulated vote via a voting form.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Copywriting, Implementation in HTML5, SASS, JavaScript, and Git
project_preview_duesseldorf_tour_alt: Düsseldorf Tourism Guide preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_duesseldorf_tour_alt: Düsseldorf Tourism Guide preview in a MacBook Pro
project_preview_duesseldorf_tour_aria: The project 'Düsseldorf Tourism Guide' opens in an overlay with more information
project_preview_duesseldorf_tour_company: School Project, Albrecht Dürer Vocational College, Düsseldorf
project_duesseldorf_tour_title: Düsseldorf Tourism Guide – Interactive City Overview
project_duesseldorf_tour_description:
Mission: Concept of a digital orientation guide for visitors of the city of Düsseldorf.

This website was developed as part of a school project for tourists discovering the city's landmarks. The goal was to create a clear platform that presents important city locations in a structured way.

Through an integrated map and a kind of digital tour, users can explore different hotspots and understand how to navigate from one place to another.

Activities: UX / UI, Concept, Copywriting, and Photography
project_preview_dailyui_festival_alt: Festival Planner – Sign-Up Interface preview in a MacBook Pro
project_details_dailyui_festival_alt: Festival Planner – Sign-Up Interface preview in a MacBook Pro
project_preview_dailyui_festival_aria: The project 'Festival Planner – Sign-Up Interface' opens in an overlay with more information
project_dailyui_festival_description:
Mission: Design of a user interface for a fictional festival planner as part of the Daily UI Challenge.

As part of the Daily UI Challenge, this sign-up interface was created for an imaginary festival planner. The goal was to design a clear and appealing registration process.

The project mainly served to further develop design skills and explore different approaches for UI layouts.

Activities: UI Design
